properties.name: keycloak.auth-server-url
properties.description: Internal base URL of the Keycloak server (used for server-side JWT validation and admin-client calls). In Docker Compose this is the service-network address, e.g. http://keycloak:8080.

properties.name: keycloak.public-url
properties.description: Browser-accessible base URL of the Keycloak server (used to build Swagger UI OAuth2 authorize/token URLs). Defaults to the auth-server-url value when running locally without Docker.

properties.name: keycloak.admin-client-id
properties.description: Client ID used by the MemberService admin client to authenticate against Keycloak.

properties.name: keycloak.admin-client-secret
properties.description: Client secret for the MemberService admin client. Must be overridden in production via the KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_CLIENT_SECRET environment variable.
